properties.title: Modern Apartment in Upper Hill
properties.description: A well-positioned apartment suitable for professionals and small families looking for convenience, security and access to Nairobi business districts.

properties.title: Spacious Living Room in Modern Two-Bedroom House
properties.description:
A bright and spacious living room in a modern two-bedroom house, designed for comfort, relaxation, and family living. The room features a clean open layout, large windows for natural lighting, quality tiled floors, modern ceiling finishes, and enough space for both seating and entertainment.

The living area is ideal for professionals, couples, or small families looking for a comfortable home with a neat, modern interior and easy access to common areas within the house.

Key Features
Spacious living room
Large windows with good natural lighting
Modern ceiling design
Clean tiled floors
Comfortable family seating area
TV wall / entertainment area
Open and well-arranged layout
Neat modern finishes
Suitable for families and professionals
Reliable management support
